category_sources: source_facts.description says libucl is a universal configuration library parser.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name gives libucl; source_facts.repo is the official vstakhov/libucl repository.
docs_sources: source_facts.homepage/source_facts.repo point to the official GitHub repository, used as the README documentation surface.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is already populated, so repo is returned as null per instruction.
tags_sources: source_facts.description identifies universal configuration parsing; source_facts.executables lists ucl_tool and related utilities.
